title: Bare Bones x Guard Villagers
description: Bare Bones textures for Guard Villagers mod ! ⚔️
body:
This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures to [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers) mod !

- I highly recommend using [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) instead of this pack - It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs !
